task_completion.description: Open the Product.java file in the IDE or editor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'Product.java' is visible in the active editor tab.

task_completion.description: Change the access modifiers of the target fields to private.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In 'Product.java', the fields 'sku', 'name', 'price', and 'stockQuantity' are declared with the 'private' keyword instead of 'public'.

task_completion.description: Add public getter and setter methods for the encapsulated fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In 'Product.java', public methods such as 'getSku()', 'setSku()', 'getName()', 'setName()', 'getPrice()', 'setPrice()', 'getStockQuantity()', and 'setStockQuantity()' are visible.

task_completion.description: Update InventoryManager.java to use the new getters and setters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'InventoryManager.java' is open and shows the use of getter and setter methods (e.g., 'product.getSku()', 'product.setPrice(...)') instead of direct field accesses.

task_completion.description: Compile the project and run ProductTest successfully.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A test runner view (like Eclipse JUnit with a green bar) or terminal output showing that 'ProductTest' has compiled and passed without errors.

integrity.description: The agent actually modified the files rather than just running a pre-made script.
